mustKeep: Confirmed business facts and explicit unknowns
No emoji or visible dash characters
mustFix: Provide a functioning inquiry path from the primary call to action.
Increase small body, navigation, disclaimer, and footer typography to readable sizes.
Make mobile links and controls at least 44px tall or wide where applicable.
Publish at least basic service-area, delivery or pickup, and timing information.
Add one authentic floral-work image so visitors can assess the studio’s style.
preserve: The restrained cream, deep green, and rust palette.
The large editorial serif headlines and numbered section system.
The botanical line-art language as a supporting brand device.
The dark studio-approach panel and its strong contrast.
The practical request-preparation checklist and clear three-service structure.
